Per storm survey: EF-0 tornado hit Forest Dunes Golf Club in southeast Crawford county. Tornado on ground for 0.3 mile/1 minute with 90 yard path width. Estimated max winds 80 mph. Couple dozen trees uprooted...three trees fell onto the roof of a home.
